name: Fire Extinguisher
tips: Put out Burning before the minion reaches its next Decay Phase.
Fire Extinguisher costs no mana, but casting it still spends an action point.
rulings: Choose a friendly minion before the spell enters the spell stage.
This Cleanse removes Burning only. Attack and maximum-health penalties remain.
Only a currently Burning friendly minion is a valid target. The target is still protected by the normal react window.
